title: clerodendrum quadrangulatum
intro: Clerodendrum quadrangulatum, also known as the butterfly flower, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Clerodendrum quadrangulatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
